falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 3% on three consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the pattern's expectation of a bottom, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume exceeds the 90th percentile of the past year's daily volume on two separate days within the 14-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would suggest a breakout or blowoff phase, directly contradicting the current HOLD and pattern similarity.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would confirm a sell-off phase is imminent, directly contradicting the current HOLD and low blowoff score of 40.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
